title: crotalaria subspicata
intro: Crotalaria subspicata, also known as the white buffalo pea or crotalaria, is a plant species within the legume family. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria subspicata include its use to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria subspicata include infusions and decoctions, which are typically made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
